productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Ultimatum Max Blue Backpack
description: Fun, style and comfort are the highlights of this tough blue nike Ultimatum Max Air compact backpack. Carry it to college, office or on a casual day out with your friends. A good looking bag with lots of space, it will accommodate everything you can think of, while you strut around in style!Height: 47 cmWidth: 40 cmDepth: 17 cmCapacity: 24 litresMade of 32% polyester and 68% nylon for enhanced durability and styleNylon lining for increased durabilityTwo main zippered compartments to accomodate all your useful itemsOne compartment with a separate laptop enclosureSecond compartment with small pouches and a small zippered pocket for storing essentialsTwo zippered pouches on the front for stowing essentialsnike Swoosh on the pouch at topMesh pockets on sides to hold bottlesExterior media-player zip pocket at left top to keep your player secure and protectedAdjustable shoulders straps with lightweight yet durable Nike Air Curve technology to snugly Fit around your shouldersStabilizing hip support panels at the backVentilated and molded back panel for breathability and comfortHaul loop for handling easeBranding on strapsBranded zippers and sliders for easy useCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
